title: Modal
description: A comprehensive modal dialog system that provides programmatic and declarative ways to display content in overlay dialogs. Supports draggable windows, minimize/maximize functionality, custom headers/footers, and various sizing options.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: Basic usage of the ax-modal component with template content

sections.title: Service
sections.description: Use the modal service to programmatically create and manage modals

sections.title: Template
sections.description: Customize modal content using templates with header, body, and footer sections

sections.title: Sizes
sections.description: Different modal sizes: small, medium, large, full screen, and fit content

sections.title: Draggable
sections.description: Draggable modals that can be moved around the screen

sections.title: Minimize/Maximize
sections.description: Modal controls for minimizing to bottom bar and maximizing to fullscreen

sections.title: Backdrop Options
sections.description: Customize backdrop behavior including click-to-close and custom styling

types.title: AXModalComponent
types.description: The main modal component that provides declarative modal functionality

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from NXComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from NXComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Opens the modal with the specified options.
 * @param options - Configuration options for the modal
 * @returns Promise<AXModalRef> - Reference to the opened modal
 */
async open(options?: AXModalOptions): Promise<AXModalRef>

/**
 * Closes the currently open modal.
 */
async close(): Promise<void>

/**
 * Sets input values for the modal content component.
 * @param values - Object containing input values to set
 */
async setInputs(values: AXComponentInputs): Promise<void>

/**
 * Minimizes the modal to the bottom bar.
 */
async minimize(): Promise<void>

/**
 * Maximizes the modal to fullscreen.
 */
async maximize(): Promise<void>

/**
 * Restores the modal from minimized or maximized state.
 */
async restore(): Promise<void>

/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

types.title: AXModalFooterComponent
types.description: Footer component for modal dialogs that provides content projection slots

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from NXComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from NXComponent.

methods.content:
/**

 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.

setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

types.title: AXModalService
types.description: Service for programmatically creating and managing modal dialogs

methods.content:
/**
 * Opens a modal with the specified content and options.
 * @param content - Component, template, or HTML element to display
 * @param options - Configuration options for the modal
 * @returns Promise<AXModalRef> - Reference to the opened modal
 */
async open(content: AXComponentContent | HTMLElement, options?: AXModalOptions): Promise<AXModalRef>

/**
 * Closes the currently open modal.
 */
async close(): Promise<void>

/**
 * Sets input values for the modal content component.
 * @param values - Object containing input values to set
 */
async setInputs(values: AXComponentInputs): Promise<void>

/**
 * Minimizes the modal to the bottom bar.
 */
async minimize(): Promise<void>

/**
 * Maximizes the modal to fullscreen.
 */
async maximize(): Promise<void>

/**
 * Restores the modal from minimized or maximized state.
 */
async restore(): Promise<void>

types.title: AXModalStateService
types.description: Internal service that manages modal state and overlay lifecycle

methods.content:
/**
 * Opens a modal with the specified content and options.
 * @param content - Component, template, or HTML element to display
 * @param options - Configuration options for the modal
 * @returns Promise<AXModalRef> - Reference to the opened modal
 */
async open<TResult = any>(content: AXComponentContent | HTMLElement, options?: AXModalOptions): Promise<AXModalRef<TResult>>

/**
 * Closes a modal by its ID.
 * @param id - The modal ID to close
 * @param data - Optional data to pass to the close event
 */
async close<TResult = any>(id: number, data?: TResult): Promise<void>

/**
 * Sets input values for a modal by its ID.
 * @param id - The modal ID
 * @param values - Object containing input values to set
 */
async setInputs(id: number, values: AXComponentInputs): Promise<void>

/**
 * Minimizes a modal by its ID.
 * @param id - The modal ID to minimize
 */
async minimize(id: number): Promise<void>

/**
 * Maximizes a modal by its ID.
 * @param id - The modal ID to maximize
 */
async maximize(id: number): Promise<void>

/**
 * Restores a modal by its ID.
 * @param id - The modal ID to restore
 */
async restore(id: number): Promise<void>

/**
 * Gets the index of a modal in the minimized stack.
 * @param targetKey - The modal ID to find
 * @returns number - The index position in the stack
 */
getMapIndexOf(targetKey: any): number
